name: Yesil Yapi Endustrisi A.S.
summary: Yesil Yapi End√É¬ºstrisi A.S. operates as a construction company in Turkey and internationally. It undertakes the construction of industrial plants, villas, commercial business centers, hospitals, housing projects, educational buildings, hotels, restoration and renovation projects, shopping malls, and cultural centers. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
